title: Catnip 19cm Fish Toys for Cat or Kitten - Interactive Plush for Indoor Cats Toys - Scratch Chewing Teeth Kick Bite Resistant for Kitten 1 Random Colour
features: Cat Toys - Fish Toy With Catnip
Dive into a world of feline fun with the World of Pets Cat Toys Fish Toy, expertly designed to captivate your cat's attention and stimulate their natural instincts.
This delightful random design fish-shaped toy is infused with premium catnip, ensuring an irresistible allure that will keep your furry friend engaged for hours on end.
Crafted from durable, pet-safe materials, it withstands even the most enthusiastic play sessions, making it a long-lasting addition to your cat's toy collection.
The vibrant colours and realistic design not only appeal to your cat's playful nature but also add a touch of charm to your home decor.
Whether your cat enjoys pouncing, batting, or cuddling, this fish toy is the perfect companion for promoting exercise and mental stimulation, ultimately contributing to a happier and healthier pet.
The Fish is aproximately 19cm long and 8cm wide
Treat your beloved feline to the joy of play with the World Of Pets Cat Toys Fish Toy, and watch as they embark on countless adventures right in your living room.
